sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ لَيْلَى افْتِتَاحَ مَشْرُوعٍ صَغِيرٍ لِصِنَاعَةِ الْحَلْوَى.
sentences.translation: Lejla je odlučila otvoriti mali projekt za izradu slastica.
sentences.translationEn: Layla decided to open a small project for making sweets.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَتْ لَيْلَى السُّوقَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ الْبِدَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je dobro istražila tržište prije početka.
sentences.translationEn: Layla studied the market well before starting.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِتَطْوِيرِ مَهَارَاتِهَا فِي الْإِدَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona naporno radi na razvijanju svojih vještina u upravljanju.
sentences.translationEn: She works hard to develop her management skills.
